name: Pogo Jumps
description: Rapid small hops on the spot to train ankle stiffness and reactive strength.
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, slight bend in knees
Jump using only ankle and calf spring — minimal knee bend
Land and immediately jump again with minimal ground contact time
Keep torso upright and arms relaxed
Perform 20–30 reps

name: Bounce Jumps
description: Moderate-height jumps focusing on elastic energy and landing mechanics.
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Load the hips slightly and jump upward
Land softly with bent knees to absorb impact
Immediately use the elastic rebound to jump again
Perform 10–15 reps

name: Box Jumps
description: Explosive jump onto a box to develop lower body power and landing control.
instructions: Stand facing a sturdy box (30–60 cm)
Swing arms back and bend knees to load the jump
Explode upward and forward to land on the box with both feet
Land softly with bent knees in an athletic position
Step back down and repeat — 5–8 reps

name: Seated Jumps
description: Jump from a seated position to eliminate the stretch reflex and test raw power.
instructions: Sit on a box with hips at 90°, feet flat on floor
Without rocking forward, drive through feet and jump upward
Extend hips, knees, and ankles fully at takeoff
Land softly with bent knees
Reset and repeat — 5–8 reps

name: Explosive Squats
description: Squat variation with a powerful upward drive to build lower body power.
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Lower into a squat until thighs are parallel
Explode upward with maximum force through legs and hips
Land softly or stop at the top with full intent
Perform 6–10 reps with full effort

name: Split Jumps
description: Plyometric lunge jump that switches legs in the air for power and coordination.
instructions: Start in a lunge position with one foot forward
Jump upward explosively, switching leg positions in the air
Land in the opposite lunge position, absorbing impact softly
Immediately jump again to switch back
Perform 8–12 reps per side

name: Explosive Leg Switching
description: Rapid alternating leg switches that develop speed and lower body power.
instructions: Stand on one leg with the other raised, hip at 90°
Explosively switch legs, driving the raised knee down and the other knee up
Minimize ground contact time between switches
Stay light on your feet and keep core tight
Perform for 20–30 seconds

name: Depth Drops
description: Step off a box and land softly to train impact absorption and stiffness.
instructions: Stand on a box (30–50 cm), toes at the edge
Step off (do not jump) and drop to the floor
Land with both feet simultaneously, absorbing with bent knees
Focus on a quiet, controlled landing
Perform 5–8 reps

name: Broad Jumps
description: Horizontal jump for maximum distance to train triple extension and power.
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Load hips back and swing arms behind
Explode forward and upward, swinging arms forward for momentum
Land with both feet, soft knees in a balanced position
Perform 5–8 reps

name: Tuck Jumps
description: Explosive jump pulling knees to chest at peak height to develop power and coordination.
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Jump as high as possible, pulling both knees toward the chest at the top
Release legs to land softly with bent knees
Absorb the landing and immediately repeat
Perform 8–10 reps

name: Burpees
description: Full-body conditioning movement combining a squat, plank, push-up, and jump.
instructions: Stand, then squat down and place hands on the floor
Jump or step feet back into a push-up position
Perform a push-up (optional)
Jump or step feet back to your hands and stand up
Jump with arms overhead to complete one rep — 10–15 reps

name: Side Jumps
description: Lateral jumps over a line to build lateral power and landing stability.
instructions: Stand on one side of a line or low obstacle
Jump laterally to the other side with both feet
Land softly with bent knees and immediately jump back
Keep a short, reactive ground contact time
Perform 10 reps per side

name: Skater Jumps
description: Single-leg lateral jumps mimicking a speed skater to build lateral power.
instructions: Stand on one leg
Explode laterally to the other side, landing on the opposite single leg
Allow the trail leg to swing behind for balance
Absorb the landing and immediately push off to the other side
Perform 10–12 reps per side

name: Single Leg Jumps
description: Unilateral jump to develop single-leg power and landing stability.
instructions: Stand on one leg with a slight knee bend
Load the hip and jump upward as high as possible
Land on the same leg with a soft knee bend
Stabilize before the next rep
Perform 5–8 reps per side

name: Lunge Jumps Alternating
description: Alternating plyometric lunges with an explosive jump between each rep.
instructions: Start in a lunge position with one foot forward
Jump upward and switch legs in the air
Land in the opposite lunge position, absorbing softly
Immediately explode up to switch again
Perform 10–12 reps per side

name: Bounding
description: Exaggerated running strides covering maximum distance per step to build elastic power.
instructions: Begin with a short jog to build momentum
Push off one leg with maximum force, reaching forward with the opposite leg
Aim for as much distance as possible per stride
Land on the opposite foot and continue in a bounding pattern
Perform for 20–30 meters per set

name: Heel Walks
description: Walking on heels to strengthen the tibialis anterior and improve dorsiflexion.
instructions: Stand tall and lift toes off the ground
Walk forward on your heels for 20–30 meters
Take small, controlled steps keeping balance
Keep core engaged and torso upright
Rest and repeat 2–3 times

name: Toe Walks
description: Walking on tiptoes to strengthen the calves and improve ankle plantar flexion.
instructions: Rise onto the balls of your feet
Walk forward on your tiptoes for 20–30 meters
Take small, controlled steps
Keep core engaged and torso upright
Rest and repeat 2–3 times

name: Ankle Hops
description: Small rapid hops using only ankles to strengthen the calves and Achilles tendon.
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Hop in place using only your ankles — keep knees mostly straight
Land on the balls of your feet and immediately hop again
Keep ground contact time as short as possible
Perform 20–30 rapid hops

name: Explosive Pushups
description: Push-up with explosive power, pushing up fast enough to briefly leave the floor.
instructions: Start in standard push-up position
Lower chest to the floor under control
Explode upward with maximum force, pushing hands off the floor
Land softly and immediately lower into the next rep
Perform 5–10 reps

name: Clap Pushups
description: Push-up with a mid-air clap to develop upper body power and coordination.
instructions: Start in standard push-up position
Lower chest to the floor with control
Explode upward with enough power to clap hands mid-air
Catch yourself with soft elbows and lower for the next rep
Perform 5–8 reps

name: Med Ball Chest Pass
description: Standing chest throw against a wall to develop upper body explosive power.
instructions: Stand 1–2 meters from a wall holding med ball at chest
Step forward and explosively push the ball into the wall
Fully extend both arms at the point of release
Catch the rebound and immediately reset
Perform 8–12 reps

name: Med Ball Slam
description: Full-body explosive throw of a med ball into the ground for power and conditioning.
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, med ball overhead
Rise onto toes and brace core
Slam the ball into the ground with maximum force
Catch on the bounce or pick it up
Repeat for 8–12 reps
